Bricolage Grotesque (variable, Latin subset)
=============================================

Used as the dashboard display typeface — referenced as the 'SakuraDisplay'
@font-face in ui/styles.css (headings + hero metrics; the body/Korean text
keeps the system stack, and the font fails gracefully to it if unavailable).

License: SIL Open Font License v1.1 (OFL) — free to embed and use commercially.
Source:  https://github.com/ateliertriay/bricolage
Vendored: cdn.jsdelivr.net/fontsource/fonts/bricolage-grotesque:vf@latest

Self-hosted as woff2 so the dashboard renders offline with no external/CDN
font request (Content-Security-Policy is font-src 'self').
